title: reel:get-script-meta args
description: Read the active (or a specified) scenario's narrative meta in one shot: synopsis, the outline tree (scenario.outline), the character-relations graph (scenario.characterRelations), and a character name<->id map. Use this BEFORE update-outline / update-relations so you know existing node/relation ids and can reference characters by name. Read-only; does not require the workbench to be open.

scenarioId.description: Optional target scenario id. Defaults to the workbench's active scenario.
